title: Keel Toys - Keeleco Frog 18 cm, SE6706, Green
features: ECO FRIENDLY - 100% RECYCLED - Eco-friendly plush, made with 100% recycled plastic.

Take a leap into the march with this fun frog. This 18 cm long environmentally friendly Keeleco plush toy is made from 100% recycled materials. Incredibly soft, kids will love cuddling and cuddling against it. You will love imagining incredible adventures and making this cuddly toy a real toy. A practical format and easy to carry.
Easy to wash – simply clean your plush toy with a damp cloth in case of small accidents.
Complies with European standards: KEELECO items are made of high-quality materials and in accordance with European safety standards for toys.
